summary: Demote the UsdaApiKey alias to toml:"-" in Config and Credentials so exactly one field persists to the on-disk api_key key.
reason: FdcApiKey (FDC_API_KEY) and UsdaApiKey (USDA_API_KEY) both carried toml:"api_key", making go-toml decode ambiguous (on-disk value landed in UsdaApiKey, FdcApiKey empty) and risking duplicate-key emission; broke 4 credential round-trip tests.
validated_outcome: auth set-token round-trip, USDA_API_KEY, and FDC_API_KEY all authenticate; go test ./... passes.
